purpose: Define the executable local adapter layer between Sanofi Elements docs/story contracts and generated HTML pages.
runtime_honesty_policy: Official runtime may only be claimed when generated HTML uses data-render-source="@sanofi-accelerator/elements" or an equivalent declared official runtime source.
Local adapters must declare data-render-source="local-atomic-component-package" and data-adapter-kind="local-adapter".
Renderer-static output must not claim component source equivalence. It is allowed only for page layout or explicitly marked fallback modules.
Story id and docs id are provenance only. They are never sufficient proof that the generated DOM is component-equivalent.

renderer_policy: Renderer layout CSS may style page shell, grids, containers, business sections, and fallback modules.
Renderer layout CSS must not style adapter component internals for adapter-first pages.
Component adapter CSS must live in a style block marked data-style-owner="component-adapter" or equivalent source.
Fallback styles must declare data-fallback-module and data-fallback-reason.

state_matrix_policy.validation_requirement: State support must be declared in the adapter registry and exposed in generated DOM through data-state-supports plus corresponding structural or CSS evidence.
